text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka! What can I do to improve my runaway
skills like you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I wanna know too!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I always simply run as fast as I can. I don't think
there's any special trick...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Aw, come on! You can tell us!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Wh-what should I tell them?)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Umm... Maybe you could practice your incline
running by taking a trip up a mountain—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: A mountain?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (It's hard to put this stuff into words...)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka! My dream is to be able to run like you.
Could I ask what your secret is?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My secret? Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(If only someone could give me the secret to
giving good advice...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (I should be safe from any questions here.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(I'm already exhausted and training hasn't even
started.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe I'll find some good pictures of some
snowy landscapes. That should get my spirits back
up.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe. It looks so quiet and chilly. How
pleasant...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Hm... I'm starting to feel a little sleepy.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Zzz... zzz... zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka begins arriving late to training
frequently.
